_comment_enabledPlugins: Plugins the cascade kit expects. Install each via Claude Code's plugin system before running /finish. The plugin names below match what /finish step 7 invokes; rename to match installed plugin IDs if your install uses different identifiers.
_comment_enabledMcpjsonServers: MCP servers the cascade reads from .mcp.json. Copy .mcp.json.example to .mcp.json and configure the credentials/endpoints for each server you want enabled. Comment out any server you don't use.
